name: Master of Pharmacy in Pharmacology
hod_reference: Under the purview of Dr. Abusufyan Shaikh and Dr. Shariq Syed (Dean)
eligibility: B.Pharm with at least 55% marks and Non-Zero Positive GPAT Score.

labs.name: Advanced Pharmacology Lab
labs.description: High-performance research laboratory equipped with micro-centrifuge, modern spectrophotometers, and organ baths.

labs.name: M.Pharm Research Lab
labs.description: Dedicated to postgraduate research projects, advanced formulation design, and analytical testing.

faculty: Same as B.Pharm faculty; specialized guides for M.Pharm students as per university norms.
